ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter configuration used for the model */,
  "features_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_features_id FOREIGN KEY ("features_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_hyperparam_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparam_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the training session */,
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter configuration used for the training session */,
  "features_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set used for the training session */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the training took place (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_features_id FOREIGN KEY ("features_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_hyperparam_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparam_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session associated with this log */,
  "iter" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the training session */,
  "log_loss_weighted" REAL /* Weighted log loss metric */,
  "log_loss" REAL /* Unweighted log loss metric */,
  "precision_weighted" REAL /* Weighted precision metric */,
  "precision_unweighted" REAL /* Unweighted precision metric */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model at the given iteration */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model at the given iteration */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model at the given iteration */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model at the given iteration */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training for the specific iteration in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance score of the feature in the model */,
  "is_categorical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is categorical */,
  "is_numeric" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is numeric */,
  "is_text" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is text */,
  "is_target" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is the target variable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this hyperparameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the hyperparameter configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log associated with this comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent model */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., uses, based on) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., F1 Score, AUC) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log associated with this metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
